expectations.evidence: For per-system remediatable CVE queries, uses limit=1 (efficient-counting) to get counts but does NOT fetch all pages of actual CVE data. The pagination exception rule for remediatable CVEs was not applied — instead used counting-only approach per system.
Table with Host, OS, Critical, Important, Total Remediatable, Last Evaluated columns.
User-facing response uses domain terms only. No tool names exposed.
Offers three follow-ups: drill into specific host, fetch remaining 63 systems, or filter by known exploits.
No explicit read-only caveat or mention of 'change management process' in the user-facing response. The stale data note for dev-worker-01 is good but the read-only scope statement is missing.
